CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b INT);
SELECT a * b AS product FROM t1;
SELECT a * (b + 1) AS product FROM t1;
SELECT SUM(a * b) AS total_product FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, value INT);
SELECT t1.a * t2.value AS combined_product FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.id;
SELECT (SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE b = 5) * (SELECT value FROM t2 WHERE id = 1) AS nested_product;
SELECT (SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE a < 0) * 5 AS negative_product;
SELECT COUNT(*) * 2 AS double_count FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE t3 (m INT, n INT);
SELECT t1.a * t3.m AS cross_product FROM t1 CROSS JOIN t3 WHERE t1.b > 0;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(b) FROM t1) * MIN(n) FROM t3;
SELECT (SUM(a) * SUM(b) + COUNT(*)) AS complex_expression FROM t1;
SELECT DISTINCT a * b AS unique_products FROM t1;
